obj_church_entrance_festival_slash_Step_: #Confide#please
#Need to drink#haunted blood
* Kris^1. It's good to see you in church./
* Even if it's^1, haunted church./
* (Kris^1, may I..^1. confide something in you?)/
* (When I arrived in the great hall to set up this morning.)/
* (The sight set me aghast.)/
* (The sanctuary^1, in shambles^1. Candles^1, books^1, torn and strewn about.)/
* (Fearing a robbery^1, I rushed to my office^1, where I found...)/
* (A handwritten note.)/
* (Not one of defamation or ransom^1, but instead...)/
* (A message^1, of encouragement.)/
* (Invoking my father's name,)/
* (It told me to follow my dreams.)/
* (How could they know^1. And how could..^1. how could they write so.)/
* (So confidently^1. With so many misspellings^1. With so many errors?)/
* (..^1. that's just it^1. The imperfection^1, lent to its sincerity...)/
* (Next time^1, I would like to write my own sermon^1, Kris.)/%
* I see^1. Yes^1. On this day of celebration^1, I too./
* Must join you in referring to the juice^1, as "haunted blood"./
* Please partake and enjoy./%
* I realize now the great hall was not harmed in vandalism^1,/
* But swept^1, by the Angel^1. In the winds of great change./
* ..^1. even so^1, there's just one detail that does not fit./
* ..^1. a number of smaller items seem to be missing.../
* Ah^1, well^1. The Angel's ways are mysterious./%
* A jack-o-lantern we use for the Festival was severely damaged./
* Why would the Angel befall harm to that one object...?/%
#Read
#Do not
* (It's a haunted poem^1. Read it?)/
* spider^1, spider^1, oh so scary/
* crawling legs so long and Hairy/
* calm and collected in the collection plate/
* you dance for coins to support our fate/
* (It seems to be encouraging you to donate...)/%
#Yes
#No
* (Cool haunted blood?)/
* (The haunted blood cools.)/%
#Everyone#put in hands
#Too scary
* (A bowl of "eyeballs.")/
\EK* Exactly^1. People put those in their mouths./%
Uhh, I knew that.
You KNEW that?
I mean, I didn't!
\E6* Huh^1? That IS weird..^1. just kind of feels like.../
\EB* Furry sausages?/
\EM* Those..^1. are my FINGERS^1, Susie./
\E2* Huh..^1. I could've sworn there were more eyeballs in here./
\Ep* Yeah^1. That's weird^1. ..^1. Kris?/%
